ddls:
CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character. */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character. */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who owns the character. */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the character was created. */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Current level of the character. */,
  "character_class" TEXT /* Class of the character. */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the character. */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the character. */,
  "health_points" INTEGER /* Current health points of the character. */,
  "mana_points" INTEGER /* Current mana points of the character. */,
  "gold" INTEGER /* Amount of gold the character has. */,
  "experience_points" INTEGER /* Current experience points of the character. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player. */,
  "username" TEXT /* Player's username. */,
  "email" TEXT /* Player's email address. */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the game. */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the player last logged into the game. */,
  "total_play_time" INTEGER /* Total time the player has spent in the game. */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Player's rank in the game. */,
  "status" TEXT /* Player's status (e.g., active, inactive). */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level. */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level number for the character. */,
  "experience_points" INTEGER /* Experience points required to reach this level. */,
  "mana_points" INTEGER /* Mana points required for this level. */,
  "health_points" INTEGER /* Health points required for this level. */,
  "attack_power" REAL /* Attack power required for this level. */,
  "defense_power" REAL /* Defense power required for this level. */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed required for this level. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "normal_summon_attacks" (
  "attack_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attack. */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the level of the attack. */,
  "attack_description" TEXT /* Description of the attack. */,
  "damage_ratio" REAL /* Damage ratio applied during the attack. */,
  "attack_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of attack. */,
  "attack_power" REAL /* Attack power of the attack. */,
  "defense_power" REAL /* Defense power of the attack. */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the attack. */,
  "mana_cost" INTEGER /* Mana cost of the attack. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attack_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_normal_summon_attacks_attack_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("attack_type_id") REFERENCES attack_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aerial_summon_attacks" (
  "attack_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aerial attack. */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the level of the attack. */,
  "attack_description" TEXT /* Description of the aerial attack. */,
  "damage_ratio" REAL /* Damage ratio applied during the aerial attack. */,
  "attack_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of attack. */,
  "attack_power" REAL /* Attack power of the attack. */,
  "defense_power" REAL /* Defense power of the attack. */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the attack. */,
  "mana_cost" INTEGER /* Mana cost of the attack. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attack_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aerial_summon_attacks_attack_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("attack_type_id") REFERENCES attack_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attack_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attack type. */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the attack type. */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attack type. */,
  "cooldown" INTEGER /* Cooldown period for the attack type. */,
  "range" REAL /* Range of the attack type. */,
  "effect" TEXT /* Special effects of the attack type. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "damage_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric. */,
  "attack_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the attack type. */,
  "damage_dealt" REAL /* Amount of damage dealt during the attack. */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the attack occurred. */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character involved in the attack. */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who performed the attack. */,
  "attack_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of attack. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_damage_metrics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_damage_metrics_attack_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("attack_type_id") REFERENCES attack_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_damage_metrics_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update. */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update. */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was released. */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the update. */,
  "is_major" INTEGER /* Indicates if the update is a major one. */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Detailed release notes. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "update_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry. */,
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the update that triggered the log. */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character affected by the update. */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Description of changes made to the character. */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the changes were made. */,
  "update_version" TEXT /* Version of the update. */,
  "old_values" TEXT /* Old values before the update. */,
  "new_values" TEXT /* New values after the update. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_update_logs_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_update_logs_update_id FOREIGN KEY ("update_id") REFERENCES game_updates ("update_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role. */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role. */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role. */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping. */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player associated with the role. */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the player. */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the role became effective. */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the role expires. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat entry. */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character the stats belong to. */,
  "attack_power" REAL /* Attack power of the character. */,
  "defense_power" REAL /* Defense power of the character. */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the character. */,
  "health_points" INTEGER /* Current health points of the character. */,
  "mana_points" INTEGER /* Current mana points of the character. */,
  "gold" INTEGER /* Amount of gold the character has. */,
  "experience_points" INTEGER /* Current experience points of the character. */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the stats were last updated. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_stats_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event. */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event. */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred. */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., level up, special attack). */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event occurred. */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the event. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry. */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event that was logged. */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character involved in the event. */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the event occurred. */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event. */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event occurred. */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the event. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES game_events ("event_id")
)
